name: Bell available weekly/winback internet offer
notes: Available weekly, winback, or door-to-door pricing may vary by address and must be confirmed by the provider or an authorized sales representative.

name: Koodo Home Internet
notes: Good value for many households; upload performance and installation availability should be checked.

name: Eastlink Internet
notes: Often useful as a Bell alternative; promo terms and upload speeds should be confirmed.

name: Purple Cow Internet
notes: Can be cost-effective, but address-level availability and support expectations matter.

name: Xplore Internet
speed_label: Rural fixed wireless or fibre where available
notes: Best considered for rural availability gaps; performance depends heavily on location.

name: Starlink Residential
notes: Potential fallback for rural homes where wired options are poor; equipment cost and latency should be checked.
